outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED - Negative net GEX across weekly/monthly expiries amplifies price swings. Spot pinned at gamma flip creates directional uncertainty.
outlook.summary: Spot (688.42) is EXACTLY at the gamma flip zone across MONTHLY_1 and MONTHLY_2 expirations, creating a critical inflection point. Net GEX is negative (-1.68B combined), indicating dealers are short gamma and will amplify any directional move. Max Pain cluster (684-690) creates strong magnetic attraction. Strong PUT WALLS at 675/670 define support, while CALL WALLS at 700/695 cap upside. Market is in equilibrium but fragile - breakout from 685-690 range will likely be violent.
